Paulus Potter

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Orpheus and the Animals
by Paulus Potter
Dutch Golden Age · 1650
Paulus Potter paints the musician charming lions, leopards, monkeys, and birds into a ring around him — a teenage showpiece for a painter who died at 28, mostly remembered for cows.
←Frans Post Praxiteles→
